content.en:
The thirtieth elder left the Eternal Dark Abyss, while Ye Tian was stationed here.

Abyssal Dao creatures don't always try to rush out, and occasionally some Abyssal Dao creatures rush out.

It's just that he needs to keep an eye on the eternal dark abyss all the time.

Such a boring life is also torture for those patriarchs.

They'd rather sleep than stay here!

Ye Tian honestly guarded the Eternal Dark Abyss at the beginning, occasionally killing some Abyssal Dao creatures.

The weakest of the Abyssal Dao creatures here are comparable to the legendary Dao realm creatures, and the most powerful ones are comparable to ordinary patriarchs.

It is precisely because of this that if there were no top thirty-six patriarchs guarding them, they would really not be able to withstand these abyssal supreme creatures.

"There are treasures in the Eternal Dark Abyss, why don't you go in and have a look!"

Ye Tian naturally did not copy his real body to enter it, but to copy the body of an abyssal supreme dao creature and then break into it.

In this way, they shouldn't be besieged by other Abyssal Dao creatures, right? But it's not certain, after all, these Abyss Dao creatures will kill each other.

Airplanes!!!!!

Ye Tian began to condense the Abyssal Dao creature called the Abyss Ancient Ape, the strength of this Abyss Dao creature was comparable to that of the Mythical Dao King Kong Early Stage, and it could be copied.

Soon, the Abyssal Australopithecus copied it.

Immediately after, Ye Tian walked into the eternal dark abyss with the copy body of this abyssal ancient ape.

......

The Abyss of Eternal Darkness.

Ye Tian came in and felt countless negative energies, as if even his will was about to be affected.

"No wonder the creatures here don't have spiritual intelligence, even if it's a normal legend to the Dao realm, if you enter here and stay for a while, you will have to lose your spiritual intelligence!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

His will is still strong, and he can hold on for a long time.

However, in such an environment, his combat effectiveness will indeed be affected.

Suddenly.

Some Abyssal Pathway creatures attacked him.

"Look for death!

Ye Tian manipulated the first sequence of supreme rules in his hand and killed them with one punch.

He walked some areas of the Eternal Darkness Abyss, and saw fighting everywhere.

The creatures of the Abyss Dao here have all grown up in countless battles, and the weak creatures have no way to survive at all, and they have all become food for other powerful Abyss Dao creatures.

It is precisely because of this that many abyssal supreme creatures comparable to the legendary Dao realm and creatures comparable to the old dollar are born here.

With the body of the Abyssal Ancient Ape, coupled with the first sequence of supreme rules, Ye Tian's combat power is also very strong, enough to rank as a second-grade elder.

So, he could easily survive here.

He wasn't interested in killing all the abyssal supreme creatures here, even if he killed them, they would be bred.

Therefore, he is only looking for treasure resources.

It would be nice to be able to find high-quality first-order order items.

However, according to the First Patriarch, almost all of the First Sequence Supreme Dao Rule products here are of low quality, but what if there are exceptions.

Anyway, it's just to come in and have a look, and it doesn't waste time.

......

"This is the first Sequence Supreme Path Rule item!

Ye Tian had just killed an Abyss Dao Creature, this Abyss Dao creature had to attack him, so he had no choice but to kill it, but when he came to the other party's lair, he found the first sequence of Dao Rule items.

Moreover, there is not one, but three.

These three first-order Supreme Rule items are shiny crystal items, which are hung on the wall of the lair by the other party and act as pendant items.

"Awesome, use the first sequence of Dao rule items as pendants!

Ye Tian was very surprised.

However, this kind of low-quality first-order supreme rule item will be severely injured or killed if it is devoured and refined, and this abyss supreme rule item naturally does not dare to refine, and it seems to have no other role than being a pendant.

"Take it!"

Ye Tian took it away.

Although there is no way to use it now, you can slowly study it in the future, and if you find a way to erase the side effects, you can use this first-order supreme rule item!

For the next long time, Ye Tian was all in the periphery of the Eternal Darkness Abyss.

He had found quite a few first-order Supreme Path Rule items, and if it had been before, he was absolutely excited.

But now, he has already comprehended the first-order supreme rules and reached the consummation realm, where do he still need these first-order supreme dao rule items!

"I guess there are no good things on the periphery, do you want to go to the depths of the Eternal Dark Abyss?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the depths, the First Elders had set up a formation and sealed a group of terrifying Abyssal Beings in the Dao.

This seal is mainly deep in the seal, so that they can't get out.

However, if you get in, it's easy.

"Go in and have a look!

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, before he could go inside, he had to give away what he found.

Thereupon.

His Abyssal Australopithecus Replica Body sent out these first-order Dao Rule items and some resources, which were received by the True Replica Body.

Then, Ye Tian's Abyssal Abyssal Ape copied his body and entered the Eternal Darkness Abyss again.

......

The depths of the abyss of eternal darkness.

There is a big array here, and its mysteries are so mysterious that even Ye Tian can't understand them.

"It should have been arranged by the First Elder, it's too complicated!"

Ye Tian observed for a while and found that the Supreme Dao rules involved in this great array did not seem to be the first sequence of Supreme Dao rules, but surpassed the first sequence of Supreme Dao rules.

"The First Elder did not take the path of the Strongest Dao, but his strength far surpassed that of the other Elders, and he must have comprehended the rules above the rules of the First Sequence of the Dao, and now it seems to be true!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He couldn't understand these rules, let alone this formation, so he walked straight in.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian was sucked into the eternal dark abyss by the great array, and when he looked back again, when he tried to get out, he couldn't get out.

His duplicate body is an Abyssal Ancient Ape, an Abyssal Supreme Dao creature, and those terrifying Abyssal Supreme Dao creatures can't get out, so naturally he can't get out either.

"Take a walk in the depths of this eternal dark abyss!"

Ye Tian hadn't walked too far before he encountered an incomparably terrifying abyssal supreme dao creature, the other party was completely broken, obviously he had just experienced a tragic battle, but at this moment, he was eyeing Ye Tian again.

【Abyss Python】

This abyssal python killed Ye Tian directly, and countless black mist turned into a sea of black mist, wanting to kill Ye Tianzhen.

But.

Ye Tian relied on the first sequence of supreme rules to block the opponent's attack and fight with the opponent.

The cultivation of this abyssal python is very high, reaching the peak realm of the Mythical Dao Realm, if it is hit hard, his copy body is not an opponent at all.
